basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Postdoctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: BTech/BE/PhD in biotechnology, biosensing technology, nanotechnology, chemical engineering, electrochemical analysis and allied topics, Minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onward, Minimum 55% or equivalent in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Postdoctoral Fellow: BTech/BE/ PhD degree in biotechnology, biosensing technology, nanotechnology, chemical engineering, electrochemical analysis and allied topics from a reputed institute with an excellent scientific publication record in the area of biosensing. The candidates who have submitted their thesis and are available to join immediately are also eligible to apply. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications should be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

salary_details.details: Rs. 72,000/- to Rs. 84,000/- per month (Including HRA)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Postdoctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BTech/BE/PhD degree in biotechnology, biosensing technology, nanotechnology, chemical engineering, electrochemical analysis, or allied fields. A minimum of 60% from graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th are also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Postdoctoral Fellow position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 72,000/- to Rs. 84,000/- per month, which includes House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Postdoctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Postdoctoral Fellow position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Gandhinagar offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While the notification specifies a maximum age limit of 35 years, age relaxation for reserved categories is typically applicable as per government rules. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specifics.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
